name: ai-agent-bridge
description: Pinned local AI agent CLIs for ai-agent-bridge

scripts.build:ts: npm --prefix packages/bridge-client-node run build && npm --prefix examples/chat-ts run build && corepack pnpm --dir examples/chat-web run build
scripts.test:ts: npm --prefix packages/bridge-client-node run test && npm --prefix examples/chat-ts run test && corepack pnpm --dir examples/chat-web run test
scripts.test:ts:coverage: npm --prefix packages/bridge-client-node run test:coverage && npm --prefix examples/chat-ts run test:coverage && corepack pnpm --dir examples/chat-web run test:coverage
